description: Use this API to add a participating branch to a specified interface flow constraint in the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = opf_intflw_brn(ifid, eibus, ejbus, cktid)

parameters.name: ifid
parameters.description: Interface flow identifier. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: eibus
parameters.description: From bus number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: ejbus
parameters.description: To bus number. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: specified branch is already participating in the interface.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
